memberdef.name: DDCRObj_methods
memberdef.initializer:
= {
{"execute", (PyCFunction)DDCRObj_execute, METH_VARARGS, "execute(x) -> ndarray
" "
" "Halfband R2C decimate, LO mix, then rate-convert.
" "
" " >>> import numpy as np
" " >>> from doppler import DDCR
" " >>> obj = DDCR(0.0, 0.25)
" " >>> y = obj.execute(np.zeros(4))
" " >>> y.dtype
" " dtype('complex64')
"}, {"reset", (PyCFunction)DDCRObj_reset, METH_NOARGS, "reset() -> None
" "
" "Zero halfband, LO phase, and filter history.
" "
" " >>> from doppler import DDCR
" " >>> obj = DDCR(0.0, 0.25)
" " >>> obj.reset()
"}, {"destroy", (PyCFunction)DDCRObj_destroy, METH_NOARGS, "Release resources."}, {"__enter__", (PyCFunction)DDCRObj_enter, METH_NOARGS, NULL}, {"__exit__", (PyCFunction)DDCRObj_exit, METH_VARARGS, NULL}, {NULL} }

memberdef.name: DDCRObjType
memberdef.initializer: = { PyVarObject_HEAD_INIT(NULL, 0) .tp_name = "ddc.DDCR", .tp_basicsize = sizeof(DDCRObject), .tp_dealloc = (destructor)DDCRObj_dealloc, .tp_flags = Py_TPFLAGS_DEFAULT, .tp_doc = "DDCR type.\n", .tp_methods = DDCRObj_methods, .tp_getset = DDCR_getset, .tp_new = DDCRObj_new, .tp_init = (initproc)DDCRObj_init, }
